---
name: Adapter request
about: Request a new low-risk source adapter or import path
title: "[Adapter]: "
labels: adapter, needs-triage
assignees: ""
---

## Source or platform

What source type do you want Source2Study to support?

## Safe import path

Which low-risk path should be supported?

- [ ] user-uploaded file
- [ ] saved HTML/PDF/Markdown
- [ ] local export JSON
- [ ] browser current-page capture
- [ ] screenshot OCR
- [ ] transcript/subtitle
- [ ] public page without login or bypass

## Source fidelity requirements

What assets must be preserved?

- [ ] text blocks
- [ ] images
- [ ] tables
- [ ] slides
- [ ] speaker notes
- [ ] timestamps
- [ ] screenshots
- [ ] OCR confidence
- [ ] source metadata

## Policy boundary

Source2Study does not accept adapter requests that require:

- cookies or cookie replay
- login bypass or session replay
- paywall bypass
- DRM bypass
- anti-bot or CAPTCHA bypass
- request-signature reverse engineering
- bulk account history crawling
- private headers, browser profiles, or token import

## Fixtures

Can you provide a small, non-private fixture that you are allowed to share?

## Expected output

What evidence records, intake warnings, or learning-pack behavior should this adapter produce?
